title: Solid Foundations
description: Lower body strength with pulse squats and lateral lunges followed by dynamic core

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Pulse squats
exercises.instructions: Stay at the bottom of the squat, small up-down pulses

exercises.name: Lateral lunges
exercises.instructions: Big lateral step, bend one leg, the other extended

exercises.name: Marching glute bridge
exercises.instructions: In glute bridge, alternate lifting one leg then the other like marching

exercises.name: Good morning
exercises.instructions: Hands behind the head, lean torso forward keeping the back straight

exercises.name: Toe touches
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs vertical, reach hands to feet

exercises.name: Shoulder plank
exercises.instructions: In high plank, tap the opposite shoulder alternating

exercises.name: Scissors
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs extended, cross alternating over/under

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
